title: कृष्ण हृदयम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री कृष्ण हृदयम् ॥

ॐ अस्य श्रीकृष्णहृदयस्तोत्रमन्त्रस्य।
नारद ऋषिः। अनुष्टुप् छन्दः।
श्रीकृष्णो देवता। कृष्णप्रीत्यर्थे जपे विनियोगः॥

वसुदेवसुतं कृष्णं देवकीनन्दनं हरिम्।
गोपालं गोपगोपीशं कृष्णहृदयं भजे॥ १॥

वृन्दावनविहारिणं वेणुवादनतत्परम्।
रासलीलारसासक्तं राधामाधवमाश्रये॥ २॥

गोवर्धनोद्धरं कृष्णं कालियनागदमनम्।
पूतनावधकं बालं यशोदानन्दवर्धनम्॥ ३॥

मथुरापुरसम्भूतं कंसध्वंसकरं प्रभुम्।
द्वारकानाथमीशानं रुक्मिणीवल्लभं हरिम्॥ ४॥

पार्थसारथिमक्षय्यं गीतामृतप्रवक्तारम्।
धर्मसंस्थापनार्थाय सम्भवामि युगे युगे॥ ५॥

सर्वधर्मान् परित्यज्य मामेकं शरणं व्रज।
अहं त्वां सर्वपापेभ्यो मोक्षयिष्यामि मा शुचः॥ ६॥

सच्चिदानन्दरूपाय पूर्णब्रह्मस्वरूपिणे।
सर्वजीवाधिवासाय कृष्णाय परमात्मने॥ ७॥

कृष्णहृदयमिदं पुण्यं यः पठेद् भक्तिसंयुतः।
कृष्णकृपां समासाद्य प्रेमभक्तिमवाप्नुयात्॥ ८॥

॥ इति श्री कृष्ण हृदयम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Krishna Hridayam ||

Om Asya Shri Krishna Hridaya Stotra Mantrasya |
Narada Rishih | Anushtup Chhandah |
Shri Krishno Devata | Krishnaprityarthe Jape Viniyogah ||

Vasudevasutam Krishnam Devaki Nandanam Harim |
Gopalam Gopagopisham Krishnahridayam Bhaje || 1 ||

Vrindavanaviahrinam Venuvaadanatatparam |
Rasaleelarasasaktam Radhamadhavam Ashraye || 2 ||

Govardhanoddharam Krishnam Kaliyanagadamanam |
Putanavadhakam Balam Yashodanandavardhanam || 3 ||

Mathuraapurasamhbutam Kamsadhvamsakaram Prabhum |
Dvarakanatham Ishanam Rukminivallabham Harim || 4 ||

Parthasarathim Akshayam Gitamritapravaktaram |
Dharmasamsthapanarathaya Sambhavami Yuge Yuge || 5 ||

Sarvadharman Parityajya Mam Ekam Sharanam Vraja |
Aham Tvam Sarvapapebhyo Mokshayishyami Ma Shuchah || 6 ||

Sachchidanandarupaya Purnabrahmasvarupine |
Sarvajeevaadhivasaya Krishnaya Paramatmane || 7 ||

Krishnahridayam Idam Punyam Yah Pathed Bhaktisanyutah |
Krishnakripam Samasadya Premabhaktim Avapnuyat || 8 ||

|| Iti Shri Krishna Hridayam Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
वसुदेवसुत, देवकीनन्दन, गोपाल, गोपगोपीश — कृष्ण हृदय का भजन करें।

वृन्दावनविहारी, वेणुवादन में तत्पर, रासलीलारसासक्त, राधामाधव की शरण।

गोवर्धनोद्धर, कालियनागदमन, पूतनावधक, यशोदानन्दवर्धन बालकृष्ण।

मथुरापुरवासी, कंसध्वंसक, द्वारकानाथ, पार्थसारथि, गीतामृतप्रवक्ता।

सर्वधर्म त्याग कर मेरी शरण आओ — मैं सर्वपापों से मोक्ष दूँगा।

भक्ति से पढ़ने वाला कृष्णकृपा से प्रेमभक्ति प्राप्त करता है।
benefits: Heart hymn of Lord Krishna covering his complete leela
Includes the supreme Gita verse of surrender
Grants prema-bhakti and Krishna's divine grace
Ideal for Janmashtami, Ekadashi, and daily Krishna worship
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Lord Krishna, Krishna Hridayam (कृष्ण हृदयम्) stands as a heart-essence prayer. This revered text originates from Brahmavaivarta Purana. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to heart hymn of Lord Krishna covering his complete leela as well as include the supreme Gita verse of surrender. Additionally, it is known to grant prema-bhakti and Krishna's divine grace. It is especially recommended on Wednesday (Budhvar) and during Janmashtami and Holi for maximum spiritual benefit. The text contains 8 verses and takes around 4 minutes to recite, fitting conveniently into a daily spiritual routine. On this page, you can read the complete Krishna Hridayam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Krishna Hridayam in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Heart hymn of Lord Krishna for divine love, devotion, and moksha.
